summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Evolution PRO Partner Notification System. All 12 features tested successfully. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components and interactions verified.

minor.issue: Returns 500 instead of 400 for invalid tipo or missing step_id (error message is correct)
Does not validate partner existence before attempting to send notification (silently fails)

issues: Minor React hydration warning about span inside select/option - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: notifications.py correctly implements anti-spam 24h deduplication via _already_notified()
Systeme.io integration is REAL and working - tags are created/added to contacts
Telegram integration requires telegram_chat_id on partner document (Partner 2 doesn't have one)
Automatic trigger on step-status/update works correctly for status=pronto and status=in_lavorazione
NotifichePanel.jsx has all 4 tipo evento buttons with correct data-testid attributes
Step select dropdown has all 8 step options (posizionamento, funnel-light, masterclass, videocorso, funnel, lancio, webinar, email)
Dynamic message preview updates correctly based on tipo and step selection
Storico notifiche collapsible section shows notification history with channels (Systeme.io visible)
test_credentials: Admin: claudio.bertogliatti@gmail.com / Evoluzione74, Partner ID: 2 (Arianna Aceto, email: ariaceto65@gmail.com, no telegram_chat_id)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system fully implemented and tested. Partner 2 (Arianna Aceto) has email but no telegram_chat_id, so Telegram notifications silently fail but Systeme.io tags work. Anti-spam blocks duplicate notifications within 24h. Tags created during tests: step_webinar_pronto, step_posizionamento_pronto, step_funnel_pronto, step_email_pronto, sistema_attivo, step_webinar_in_lavorazione. The notification_log collection in MongoDB stores all sent notifications.

mocked_apis.notes: Telegram bot will not deliver messages since partner 2 has no telegram_chat_id. Systeme.io tag creation is REAL and working.
